name: aurora-stat-card
title: Aurora Stat Card
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Metric stat card with label, large value, trend indicator, and Aurora panel styling.
docs:
Aurora component that expects `aurora-tokens` to be installed first.

Default install target: `@ui/aurora/stat-card.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-button`, `aurora-input`, `aurora-radio-group`, `aurora-select`.
